name: daily-spend-report
_phase_4_note: Phase 4 OBS-03 — pure n8n version (no Railway Python worker dependency). Fires once per day at 12:00 UTC (08:00 ET EDT, 07:00 ET EST). Queries Supabase /rest/v1/runs for yesterday's spend, formats a 3-line Georgian Telegram message, sends it, then writes a 'daily_spend_report' runs row for verifier OBS-03.

parameters.jsonBody: ={"kind":"daily_spend_report","agent_id":"daily-spend-report","start_time":"{{ $now.toISO() }}","end_time":"{{ $now.toISO() }}","token_cost":0,"tokens_input":0,"tokens_output":0,"exit_status":"sent","exit_reason":"n8n cron fired pure-n8n daily spend report"}
